name: Low Peer Safety Schooling
description: School did not feel socially safe, so growth became linked with vigilance and distance.
life_effect: Future group settings may trigger caution before curiosity.

name: Teacher Recognition Window
description: A teacher or mentor became proof that a different self could be seen.
life_effect: Specific adult recognition can reopen action momentum after school damage.

name: School Fit Misalignment
description: The school track feels like a compromised placement rather than a chosen environment.
life_effect: The person may keep searching for a second educational identity.

name: Exam Setback Identity Mark
description: Exam disappointment became a self-evaluation mark, not only an educational event.
life_effect: Later choices may overcompensate by seeking a more legitimate track.

name: Fragmented Study Rhythm
description: Learning effort exists, but direction switching breaks accumulation.
life_effect: Future education branches need a fixed test window, not more information scanning.
